hooks.name: block-dangerous-tools
hooks.description: Blocks destructive tool calls before they execute — enforcement independent of model reasoning
hooks.run: if [[ "$TOOL" == "delete_file" || "$TOOL" == "delete_directory" || "$TOOL" == "drop_table" ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive tool call denied by policy'; exit 1; fi

hooks.name: block-production-writes
hooks.description: Prevents any write to production config paths without explicit authorization
hooks.run: if [[ "$TOOL" == *"write"* ]] && [[ "$TOOL_ARGS" == *"config/production"* ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Production writes require environment approval'; exit 1; fi

hooks.name: audit-all-tool-calls
hooks.description: Logs every tool call for traceability — fires AFTER the tool executes

hooks.name: escalate-on-tool-error
hooks.description: Captures tool failures and triggers escalation — fires on error
hooks.run: echo "[ERROR] Tool: $TOOL failed. Error: $ERROR_MESSAGE. Run: $GITHUB_RUN_ID" >> /tmp/agent-errors.log && gh issue comment $GITHUB_PR_NUMBER --body "⚠️ Agent tool failure: $TOOL — $ERROR_MESSAGE. Escalating for human review."
